posts.author: avp (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need a way to query all boards in a workspace for a consolidated view of their permissions / to query which boards have a specific permission set.

Use case: I inherited a set of ~50 boards where many have the “View only if assigned or created by me” permission set, which is causing havoc with dashboards. It is not practical to go through every single board to reset this permission.
